parameters.name: result
parameters.label: Result Type
parameters.description: How to construct the trail geometry.

parameters.name: length
parameters.label: Trail Length
parameters.description: This sets the length of the trail by establishing the maximum number of frames for the Trail to use, i.e. a of will connect the geometry from the previous twenty-five frames.

parameters.name: inc
parameters.label: Trail Increment
parameters.description: This will skip the given number of frames to build a trail with fewer points in it, but the same length. This will lower the resolution of the trail by reducing the number of points in the trail. This

parameters.name: cache
parameters.label: Cache Size
parameters.description: The number of frames to keep cached in available memory.

parameters.name: evalframe
parameters.label: Evaluate Within Frame Range
parameters.description: This option specifies that the Trail will only evaluate, or cook, within the current frame range ( , ). If this option is not enabled, the can evaluate prior to the start frame.

parameters.name: surftype
parameters.label: Connectivity
parameters.description: This option is used to select the type of surface, when using a .

parameters.name: close
parameters.label: Close Rows
parameters.description: When selected, closes the rows in the output selection.

parameters.name: velscale
parameters.label: Velocity Scale
parameters.description: Scales the velocity by a specific value when is selected.

parameters.name: reset
parameters.label: Reset
parameters.description: While on, clears any cached geometries, resetting the trail to mirror the input.

parameters.name: resetpulse
parameters.label: Reset Pulse
parameters.description: Reset the geometry for a single frame.
